title: CSULB Hackathon
shortDescription: 24-hour hackathon to build creative software projects.
description: ACM is hosting a 24-hour campus hackathon where students form teams to design, build, and present creative software projects. Participants will work with mentors from industry, explore new technologies, and compete for prizes.

title: Beach Concert Night
shortDescription: Live music, food trucks, and student bands under the lights.
description: Join the CSULB Music Society for an evening of live music featuring student bands and local artists. The event will include food trucks, merch booths, and a relaxed atmosphere to enjoy performances.

title: Intramural Soccer Kickoff
shortDescription: Kickoff event for intramural soccer season.
description: The intramural soccer season begins with friendly matches and sign-ups. Meet other players, support teams, and enjoy a lively campus sports atmosphere.

title: Startup Networking Night
shortDescription: Meet founders and build startup connections.
description: Connect with local entrepreneurs and alumni to learn about launching startups, building teams, and navigating the business world.

title: Cybersecurity Capture the Flag
shortDescription: Hands-on cybersecurity competition with real challenges.
description: Compete in challenges involving cryptography, web security, and digital forensics. Learn practical skills used in cybersecurity careers.

title: Art & Sketch Meetup
shortDescription: Relaxed sketch session for artists of all levels.
description: Bring your sketchbook and collaborate with other artists. Share ideas, learn techniques, and enjoy a creative environment.

title: Fitness Bootcamp
description: Join trainers for a group workout including strength, cardio, and team challenges in a motivating environment.

title: Game Development Workshop
shortDescription: Learn Unity basics and build a small game.
description: Hands-on workshop introducing Unity game development, including object interaction and simple scripting.

title: Poetry Open Mic
shortDescription: Open mic for poetry and spoken word.
description: Share your work or listen to others in a welcoming creative space filled with expression and conversation.

title: Beach Volleyball Tournament
description: Teams compete in a lively tournament filled with energy, competition, and school spirit.

title: AI and Ethics Panel
shortDescription: Discussion on ethical impacts of AI.
description: Faculty and researchers discuss AI decision-making, privacy concerns, and societal implications of intelligent systems.

title: Cultural Food Festival
shortDescription: Food, music, and culture from around the world.
description: Experience global cuisines, cultural performances, and student-hosted booths celebrating diversity on campus.
